localization.name: Burning Spirit
localization.description: Damage to 1 Enemy. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.
localization.selected:
Damages an enemy, burns user, adds Spirit
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Guard Incinerator
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. The user and the target are granted the Burn status effect if the target was a Guardian. This will overwrite other status effects on both units.
localization.selected:
500% damage to a Guardian, burns user & target
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Burning Blaze
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth and Counter Stance Status Effects, the effects of Skin passive skills, and Revenge passive skills. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Raging Ignition
localization.description: All non-sleeping allies are granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Then all allies that already had the Burn status effect will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken and Enrage skills. The user is healed for 200% of the user's attack. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.
localization.selected:
Burn allies, Quicken and Enrage burning allies
(Will overwrite non-sleep status effects)

localization.name: Sweeping Flames
localization.description: 150% damage to all enemies, this attack ignores skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. All allies are healed for 150% of the user's attack. All allies will become burned. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. This skill becomes locked for 300TU after use.
localization.selected:
150% damage to all enemies, heals and burns allies
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Rally Troops
localization.description: Adds Red Knights equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield to the allied reinforcements.
localization.selected: One Red Knight is called for each burning unit

localization.name: Last Standing
localization.description: This unit cannot be defeated while it has any other allies on the battlefield.

localization.name: Unflinching
localization.description: This unit cannot be defeated by damage from the Poison or Burn status effects.

localization.name: Stun Immunity
localization.description: This unit is not affected by stun effects.
